name: Neck Rolls
desc: Slowly roll your head in a full circle. 5 times each direction. Keep your shoulders relaxed.

name: Shoulder Shrugs
desc: Raise both shoulders up toward your ears, hold 3 seconds, then drop. Repeat 10 times.

name: Chest Opener
desc: Clasp hands behind your back, straighten arms, and lift gently while squeezing shoulder blades together. Hold 20 seconds, repeat 3 times.

name: Seated Spinal Twist
desc: Sitting up straight, twist to one side with your opposite hand on your knee. Hold 15 seconds each side, repeat twice.

name: Wrist Circles
desc: Extend arms forward, make fists, and circle your wrists 10 times in each direction.

name: Standing Quad Stretch
desc: Stand on one leg, pull the other foot toward your glute. Hold 20 seconds each side. Use a wall for balance.

name: Calf Raises
desc: Stand with feet hip-width apart, rise onto your toes, hold 2 seconds, lower slowly. Repeat 15 times.

name: Hip Flexor Stretch
desc: Step one foot forward into a lunge, drop the back knee to the floor. Push hips forward gently. Hold 30 seconds each side.

name: Cat-Cow
desc: On all fours, arch your back up (cat), then dip it down (cow). Move slowly with your breath. 10 cycles.

name: Wall Angels
desc: Stand with back flat against a wall, arms in goalpost position. Slide arms up and down slowly. 10 reps.

name: Figure-4 Stretch
desc: Sit in a chair, cross one ankle over the opposite knee. Lean forward gently until you feel a stretch in your hip. 20 seconds each side.

name: Doorway Chest Stretch
desc: Stand in a doorway, arms on the frame at 90 degrees. Step forward until you feel a stretch across your chest. Hold 20 seconds.

name: Hamstring Stretch
desc: Stand and place one heel on a low step or chair. Keep your leg straight and lean forward from the hips. 20 seconds each side.

name: Deep Breathing
desc: Sit comfortably. Breathe in for 4 counts, hold for 4, out for 6. Repeat 5 times. Let your shoulders drop.

name: Glute Bridge
desc: Lie on your back, knees bent, feet flat. Lift your hips toward the ceiling, squeeze glutes at the top. Hold 3 seconds. 10 reps.
